ValidationRule.description: OBJECTIF : Post Governance : SPC/Governance Date !=null // Governance Outcome doit être "Approved"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND ( RecordType.Name = "IS Agreement" , NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Post Governance"), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(SPC_Status__c)), ISBLANK(Governance_Decision_Date__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Governance_Decision__c, "Approved")) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To proceed to "Post Governance" stage, the following criteria need to be met : SPC Status and Gouvernance Decision Date cannot be blank and the Gouvernance Decision must be 'Approved'.
